---
title: "Applied Differential Privacy"
---

A hands-on course on differential privacy and privacy-preserving machine learning.

Lectures pair narrative slides with **live, in-browser interactivity** — every computation is
imported from the course library [`libdpy`](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/pub_lib); this
site only presents and wires it together.

- [Schedule](schedule.qmd) — lecture status and links.
- [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd) — topics, prerequisites, logistics.
- [Slide authoring tutorial](tutorials/slide-authoring/tutorial.ipynb) — examples for editing notebook-based slides.

## Featured: reconstruction lecture

The [reconstruction attacks lecture](lectures/02-reconstruction/notebook.ipynb) is now a
notebook-first slide deck: edit the lecture in the notebook, render it to RevealJS, and use the
embedded browser-native slab widgets directly in the web deck.
